metric_definitions.availability: Percentage of total operational time spent in non-fault and non-charging states.
metric_definitions.active_robots: Any robot that has recorded at least one location/status ping in the telemetry dataset during the recording period.

anomalies.note: Found underscores in zone names (e.g., PDD_A). Replaced '_' with '-' to standardize.
Found missing severity values. Filled empty cells with 'unknown'.
Found mixed casing in robot states. Converted all to lowercase using .str.lower().
Found underscores and trailing spaces in zones. Replaced '_' with '-' and stripped spaces.
Found missing battery percentages. Filled with 0.
Found transaction amounts >= 100 (e.g., 350). Assumed missing decimals and divided by 100.
Found pre-deployment (May 30/31) and late sync (Jun 20) logs breaking the 30-min cadence. Filtered dataset strictly to June 1 - June 14.
